title: lantana arida f. zanonii
intro: Lantana arida f. zanonii, also known as the Anacua or Yellow Anacua, is a shrub-like plant native to the subtropical regions of the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Lantana arida f. zanonii can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
